item.title: You like what you see
item.description: Face it. I bet you do
item.dc:creator: KanyesSideFish

item.title: Day 365: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Crypto's Maple Cheeseburger Maple Syrup Infused Beef Patty, Brown Sugar Bacon, Swiss & Tillamook Cheddar Cheese, Dill Pickles, Lettuce, Tomato, Sriracha Maple Mayo Sauce, Brioche Bun It's Been A Fun Year But, I'm Sad To Announce That This Will Be My Last Burger Post. Thank You @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U For Making And Keeping The Burger Map Up To Date (https://www.yelp.com/collection/bC9_rzUHacSeeBCC_2mA3w/crypto) Thank You @CrisprCAS For All Your Monty Python Gifs Pretty Sure Every One Was Here For Them More Than The Burgers Thank You @imgur For The Chance To Share What Started As A Joke Between Friends With Everyone Else Q&A: If You Have Any Questions For Me Leave A Comment And I'll Try To Answer Every Single One
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: This is what happens when you block the tram in Sheffield
item.dc:creator: Uraza111

item.title: Interesting Fact.
item.description: Lavinia Ellen "Vinnie" Ream Hoxie (September 25, 1847 – November 20, 1914) was an American sculptor. Her most famous work is the statue of U.S. President Abraham Lincoln in the U.S. Capitol rotunda.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

heck yes

item.title: Slavery exists for the poor in the school to prison pipeline. Rich white kids get off from “affluenza” while black & brown children as you g as 4 get handcuffed and arrested for stuff white abled bodied children get a timeout for
item.description: Slavery exists for the poor in the school to prison pipeline. Rich white kids get off from “affluenza” while black & brown children as young as 4 get handcuffed and arrested for stuff white abled bodied children get a timeout for https://www.aclu.org/news/criminal-law-reform/police-in-schools-continue-to-target-black-brown-and-indigenous-students-with-disabilities-the-trump-administration-has-data-thats-likely-to-prove-it this is actual critical race theory and its parent critical legal studies and as applied to the legislation and law between rich and poor and how it inherited is used for eugenics to make it worse for BIPOC and disabled people https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Critical_race_theory https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Critical_legal_studies https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Disability_studies
item.dc:creator: roanhouse

item.title: Images of Note: Entry
item.description:
Discord: https://discord.gg/RCrcZzA
Hey there, do you want to watch some little gremlin attempt to develop an RPG? Well tune into https://www.twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Monday, Wednesday and Friday at 7pm UK time to watch me attempt to make a JRPG.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
